/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/cutefish-style.dir/link.d  -o libcutefish-style.so "CMakeFiles/cutefish-style.dir/cutefish-style_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/cutefish-style.dir/basestyle.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/cutefish-style.dir/blurhelper.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/cutefish-style.dir/shadowhelper.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/cutefish-style.dir/pstyleplugin.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/cutefish-style.dir/phantomcolor.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/cutefish-style.dir/boxshadowrenderer.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/cutefish-style.dir/tileset.cpp.o"  /usr/lib/libxkbcommon.so /usr/lib/libQt6Widgets.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.0 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.0
